[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0001000100 2
2 1000000010 2
3 1000000110 3
4 1101110111 8
5 0001110000 3
6 1001101100 5
7 1100000010 3
